home.headlinePart1: Show your work to the world

services.title: Services
services.descriptionPart1: At MDK, we turn ideas into amazing digital experiences. We offer a full range of services to meet your technology needs,
services.descriptionPart2: ensuring each project is a success from start to finish.

websiteDevelopment.abstractPart1: Your website can be your company's most efficient sales tool.
websiteDevelopment.abstractPart2: We create personalized digital solutions, combining optimized websites and custom systems to deliver real results.
websiteDevelopment.description: High-performance digital solutions tailored to you. Total focus on conversion, usability, and premium design. We build a machine to attract clients 24/7.

consulting.abstractPart2: We help your company plan and implement tech solutions that drive growth with efficiency and security.
consulting.description: Smart decisions that reduce costs and scale profits. We design the ideal technological roadmap for your company to grow with a competitive edge.

uxuidesign.abstractPart1: Delighted customers come back every time.
uxuidesign.abstractPart2: Our designs are not just beautiful; they are strategically designed to capture attention and turn visitors into loyal customers.
uxuidesign.description: Memorable interfaces that capture attention in the first second. We transform complexity into fluid and intuitive experiences, designed to drive conversion and trust.

aboutUs.title: Meet our team
aboutUs.description: At MDK Studio, our team of developers is at the heart of what we do. We are dedicated and passionate about creating innovative solutions that turn ideas into reality.

questions.question: How much does it cost to build a website?
questions.answer: The cost depends on several factors, including the project's complexity, number of pages, and specific features required. We offer personalized quotes based on your needs and requirements.

questions.question: How can I update my website content after it's finished?
questions.answer: We provide basic training so you can manage and modify texts, images, and other site elements. If you prefer, we can also handle updates for you as needed.

questions.question: Can MDK Studio help me choose a domain name?
questions.answer: Yes, we can help you choose a domain name. We consider factors such as relevance to your business, ease of memorization, and availability. We offer guidance and suggestions to find a name that fits your brand identity and is available for registration.

questions.question: How long does it take to complete my website?
questions.answer: The timeline may vary depending on the project's complexity, but generally, a simple website takes 2 to 3 weeks to develop. More complex projects, such as web applications or advanced functionality, may take longer.

questions.question: Does MDK Studio offer technical support after the website is launched?
questions.answer: Yes, we offer technical support after the website is launched. This includes bug fixes, security updates, necessary adjustments, and guidance on managing content. We're here to ensure your website continues to run smoothly and meets your needs.

questions.question: Does MDK Studio provide hosting services?
questions.answer: We offer recommendations for hosting services and can help set up the hosting environment, but we do not provide hosting services directly.

questions.question: How can I get in touch to request a quote or consultation?
questions.answer: You can contact us through the form on our website, via email, or by phone. We're available to discuss your needs and provide a personalized quote.

form.title: Talk to our team
form.description: We'd love to hear from you. Please fill out this form or send us an email.

email.title: Email
email.text: Our team is here to help

privacy.pageTitle: Privacy Policy — Enigma Case | MDK Studio
privacy.metaDescription: Read the privacy policy for Enigma Case, developed by MDK Studio. Understand how your data is handled in the app available on the Google Play Store.
privacy.quickSummaryText: Enigma Case is an offline game that does not collect personal data. All progress is saved locally on your device. No account, no server, no tracking.

items.subtitle: Data we do NOT collect
items.text: Enigma Case is an offline game. We do not collect names, emails, phone numbers, location, or any personally identifiable information.

items.subtitle: Game progress (local storage)
items.text: Progress data, such as unlocked cases, achievements, and settings, is saved exclusively in your device's local storage using AsyncStorage/MMKV. This data never leaves your device.

items.subtitle: Game functionality
items.text: Locally saved data is used solely to maintain your progress between sessions, exactly as you would expect from any game.

items.subtitle: Quality improvements
items.text: Anonymous crash reports help us identify and fix bugs, ensuring a better experience for all players.

items.subtitle: We do not sell your data
items.text: We never sell, rent, or commercialize user information with third parties for advertising or any other purpose.

items.subtitle: Infrastructure third parties
items.text: We may use services such as Expo Application Services (EAS) for distribution and technical analysis. These services follow their own privacy policies and only handle aggregated technical data.

items.subtitle: Local data protected by the OS
items.text: Since all data stays on your device, it is protected by Android's native safeguards (app sandbox, disk encryption when enabled by the device).

items.subtitle: No personal data transmission
items.text: Because we do not transmit personal data to external servers, the risk of a personal data breach is inherently minimal.

items.subtitle: Data deletion
items.text: To delete all game data, simply uninstall the app from your device. All local data will be automatically removed by the operating system.

items.subtitle: No account required
items.text: Enigma Case does not require account creation. You can play completely anonymously.

items.subtitle: Children
items.text: The app is rated for ages 10 and up, as indicated on the Google Play Store. We do not intentionally collect data from children.

items.subtitle: Change notifications
items.text: If this policy is materially updated, we will publish the new version on this page with an updated effective date. We recommend reviewing it periodically.

items.subtitle: Continued use
items.text: Continued use of the app after changes are published constitutes acceptance of those changes.

items.subtitle: Questions or requests
items.text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise any rights related to personal data, please contact us at:
